name: EB OE TS.Z./HENKEL VZ
summary: EB OE TS.Z./HENKEL VZ is a tracker certificate linked to Henkel AG & Co. KGaA Vz, a German chemical and consumer goods company. Henkel operates worldwide with leading brands and technologies in three business areas: Laundry & Home Care, Beauty Care, and Adhesive Technologies. The certificate allows investors to participate in the performance of Henkel's stock.
